zh.lifeSummary: Alice Eccles是William Eccles的女兒，於1190年出生在英國藍卡爾巴頓 武朋 易維爾。她於1239年與Alexander de Denton結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1248年在英國藍卡爾丹頓享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Eccles是William Eccles的女儿，于1190年出生在英国藍卡爾巴頓 武朋 易維爾。她于1239年与Alexander de Denton结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1248年在英国藍卡爾丹頓享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eccles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Eccles in Lancashire, or possibly from any of several other places so named in Kent, Norfolk, Berwickshire, and Dumfriesshire, from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’). Such places would have been the sites of notable pre-Anglo-Saxon churches or Christian places of communal worship.

variants.name: Exley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Exley in Southowram (Yorkshire), from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Eccles .
Americanized form of South German   Oechsle  .

variants.name: Echols
meanings: Altered form of English   Eccles   and possibly also of German   Eckels  .

variants.name: Eckles
meanings: English: variant of   Eccles  . This form is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Eccles was born in 1190, in Barton upon Irwell, Lancashire, England as the daughter of William Eccles. She married Alexander de Denton in 1239. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1248, in Denton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Eccles est née en 1190, à Barton upon Irwell, Lancashire, Angleterre, fille de William Eccles. Elle a épousé Alexander de Denton en 1239. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1248, à Denton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Alice Eccles wurde 1190 in Barton upon Irwell, Lancashire, England, als Tochter von William Eccles geboren. Sie hat 1239 Alexander de Denton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1248 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Denton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Alice Eccles è nata il nel 1190 nel Barton upon Irwell, Lancashire, England come figlia di William Eccles. Lei sposato Alexander de Denton nel 1239. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1248, nel Denton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Ecclesは1190年にイギリスランカシュアイアバートン ウプオン イルウエルでWilliam Ecclesの娘として生まれた。1239年にAlexander de Dentonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1248年にイギリスランカシュアイアデントンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Eccles(은)는 1190년 영국 랭카실르 바턴 업 웰에서 William Eccles의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1239년 Alexander de Denton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1248년 영국 랭카실르 덴턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice Eccles nasceu em 1190, em Barton upon Irwell, Lancashire, Inglaterra filha de William Eccles. Ela casou-se com Alexander de Denton em 1239. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1248, em Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Eccles родилась в 1190 г. в местности бартон упон ирвелл, ланкашир, Англия. Её отца звали William Eccles. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander de Denton в 1239 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1248 г. в местности дентон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Alice Eccles nació en 1190, en Barton upon Irwell, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hija de William Eccles. Se casó con Alexander de Denton en 1239. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1248, en Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
